headline: Scotiabank Maintains Sector Outperform on Essex Property Trust, Lowers Price Target to $278
summary: Scotiabank  analyst Nicholas Yulico   maintains Essex Property Trust (NYSE:ESS) with a Sector Outperform and lowers the price target from $284 to $278.
